front.title: Composite ML-DSA for use in Internet PKI

abstract.t: This document defines Post-Quantum / Traditional composite Key Signaturem algorithms suitable for use within X.509, PKIX and CMS protocols. Composite algorithms are provided which combine ML-DSA with RSA, ECDSA, Ed25519, and Ed448. The provided set of composite algorithms should meet most X.509, PKIX, and CMS needs.
